title: Create automated_searches table
description: Design and implement the automated_searches table with entity relationships, search configuration, and scheduling fields
acceptance_criteria: ["Table created with all required columns","Foreign keys to transit_agencies and service_providers","RLS policies implemented","Indexes created for performance"]

title: Create search_results table
description: Implement search_results table with deduplication and processing status tracking
acceptance_criteria: ["Table created with unique constraint on search_id + source_url","Foreign key to automated_searches","Link field for pending_articles","RLS policies implemented"]

title: Add performance indexes
description: Create indexes for scheduled search lookup, entity lookups, and deduplication
acceptance_criteria: ["Index on next_run_at for scheduling","Index on agency_id and provider_id","Index on source_url for deduplication","Query performance verified"]
notes: Indexes were already created during table creation in AQ-1.1 and AQ-1.2

title: Enable pg_cron extension
description: Enable and configure pg_cron extension for scheduled job execution
acceptance_criteria: ["pg_cron extension enabled","pg_net extension enabled","Permissions configured","Test job runs successfully"]

title: Create hourly search execution cron job
description: Set up cron job to execute automated searches every hour
acceptance_criteria: ["Cron job scheduled for hourly execution","Calls execute-automated-searches function","Proper authentication configured","Monitoring enabled"]

title: Create daily query regeneration cron job
description: Set up cron job to regenerate search queries daily
acceptance_criteria: ["Cron job scheduled for daily execution","Calls generate-targeted-searches function","Updates existing searches","Deactivates stale searches"]

title: Create automated searches admin page
description: Build admin page to manage automated searches
acceptance_criteria: ["Table view of all automated searches","Filter by search_type, status, entity","Sort by next_run_at, results_count, priority","Pagination implemented","Responsive design"]

title: Add search performance metrics dashboard
description: Create dashboard showing search performance and conversion rates
acceptance_criteria: ["Charts showing discoveries over time","Conversion rate (discoveries → pending articles)","Top performing search queries","Entity coverage metrics","Cost tracking (API calls)"]

title: Add manual trigger functionality
description: Allow admins to manually trigger search execution
acceptance_criteria: ["Button to trigger generate-targeted-searches","Button to trigger execute-automated-searches","Button to trigger process-search-results","Loading states during execution","Success/error notifications","Confirmation dialogs"]

title: Link articles to source searches
description: Show which automated search discovered each article
acceptance_criteria: ["Badge on pending articles showing source search","Filter pending articles by search source","Link from article to search details","Search attribution preserved after approval"]

title: Search query editor
description: Build interface to edit and test search queries
acceptance_criteria: ["Form to edit search_query and parameters","Test button to preview results","Activate/deactivate searches","Adjust frequency and priority","Input validation"]

title: Create generate-targeted-searches edge function
description: Build edge function to query agencies/providers and generate targeted search queries
acceptance_criteria: ["Function queries transit_agencies table","Function queries service_providers table","Generates agency-specific searches","Generates provider-specific searches","Generates vertical/keyword searches","Admin authentication enforced","Proper error handling and logging"]

title: Create execute-automated-searches edge function
description: Build edge function to execute scheduled searches using Exa API
acceptance_criteria: ["Finds searches ready to run","Calls Exa API with search queries","Handles API errors gracefully","Inserts results with deduplication","Updates scheduling fields","Logs to discovery_runs","Respects rate limits"]

title: Create process-search-results edge function
description: Build edge function to convert search results into pending articles
acceptance_criteria: ["Finds unprocessed search_results","Checks for duplicates in pending_articles","Calls transform-article for new URLs","Creates pending_articles records","Links search_result to pending_article","Marks results as processed","Proper error handling"]
notes: Edge function created to process search results, extract content via Firecrawl, analyze with AI, and add high-quality articles to pending_articles

title: Test with pilot batch of agencies
description: Run system with 10 high-priority agencies
acceptance_criteria: ["Select 10 diverse transit agencies","Generate searches for pilot agencies","Execute searches and monitor results","Verify pending articles created","Document success rate and issues"]

title: Monitor conversion rates
description: Track and analyze discovery-to-article conversion
acceptance_criteria: ["Measure discovery → pending article rate","Measure pending → published article rate","Identify low-performing searches","Document quality of AI extractions","Create performance baseline"]

title: Optimize search queries
description: Refine queries based on performance data
acceptance_criteria: ["Adjust queries with low hit rates","Add exclusion terms to reduce noise","Test vertical-specific variations","Update search parameters","A/B test query variations"]

title: Tune relevance scoring
description: Adjust AI confidence thresholds and filters
acceptance_criteria: ["Analyze false positives","Adjust AI confidence threshold","Refine entity extraction","Improve category classification","Document tuning decisions"]

title: Create workflow documentation
description: Document system for team and future reference
acceptance_criteria: ["System architecture diagram","Admin user guide","Troubleshooting guide","Query optimization guide","Update DATABASE_SCHEMA.md"]

title: Create agent state management tables with Realtime
description: Implement database tables for agent state (agent_sessions, research_resources, agent_logs) with Supabase Realtime subscriptions for bidirectional state sync between edge functions and React UI. Include session tracking, resource lists, and progress logs.
acceptance_criteria: ["Tables created: agent_sessions, research_resources, agent_logs","Realtime publication enabled on all agent tables","Migration includes proper indexes and foreign keys","RLS policies configured for authenticated users"]

title: Implement SSE streaming for edge function logs
description: Create Server-Sent Events (SSE) endpoint in edge function for real-time log streaming during agent execution. Use SSE for immediate progress updates, then persist final state to database. Include proper error handling and connection management.
acceptance_criteria: ["SSE endpoint returns proper text/event-stream headers","Logs stream in real-time during agent execution","Final state persisted to agent_sessions table","Client-side EventSource handles reconnection","CORS headers configured correctly"]

title: Build agent state React hook with Realtime
description: Create useAgentState hook that subscribes to Realtime changes on agent_sessions, research_resources, and agent_logs tables. Include SSE connection for streaming logs. Handle connection lifecycle, error recovery, and automatic reconnection.
acceptance_criteria: ["Hook subscribes to all agent state tables","SSE EventSource connects to edge function","State updates trigger React re-renders","Cleanup on unmount prevents memory leaks","Error states properly handled and displayed"]

title: Create agent dashboard with live progress UI
description: Build agent dashboard page showing live research progress: editable report field, resource list with add/edit/delete, streaming logs display, and status indicators. All synced via Realtime and SSE. Include TypeScript interfaces for Log and Resource types.
acceptance_criteria: ["Dashboard displays session status and progress","Report field updates in real-time via Realtime","Resources list syncs automatically","Logs stream via SSE and display sequentially","Users can edit report, add/remove resources","Loading and error states handled gracefully"]

title: Integrate agent state with search workflow
description: Connect agent state management to existing execute-automated-searches and process-search-results edge functions. Update agent_sessions with progress, add discovered articles to research_resources, stream logs during processing.
acceptance_criteria: ["execute-automated-searches writes to agent_sessions","process-search-results adds to research_resources","Logs stream via SSE during execution","Final scores and analysis update agent state","Error states properly recorded in agent_logs"]
